ddls:
CREATE TABLE "risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk entry */,
  "potential_problem" TEXT /* Description of the potential problem */,
  "loss_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of loss on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "probability" INTEGER /* Probability of occurrence on a scale of 1 to 5 */,
  "risk_score" INTEGER /* Calculated risk score based on severity and probability */,
  "mitigation_plan" TEXT /* Detailed plan for mitigating the identified risk */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk category */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the risk */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who identified the risk */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the risk was identified */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the risk */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the risk was last updated */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed information about the potential impact of the risk */,
  "mitigation_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the mitigation plan */,
  "mitigation_responsible" INTEGER /* User ID of the person responsible for the mitigation plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risks_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES risk_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risks_mitigation_responsible FOREIGN KEY ("mitigation_responsible") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "risk_assessment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of risk assessments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment entry */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk being assessed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the risk */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "assessed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who performed the assessment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments during the assessment */,
  "assessment_score" INTEGER /* Score for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES risks ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_assessed_by FOREIGN KEY ("assessed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, team member) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk related to the mitigation plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the mitigation plan (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the person responsible for the status update */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_status_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mitigation_status_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES risks ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment entry */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk being assigned a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES risk_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_category_assignments_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES risks ("risk_id")
)
